title: helleborine africana
intro: Helleborine africana, also known as Helleborine or Lady's Ringlets, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Epipactis, a group of terrestrial orchids. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Helleborine africana are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Helleborine africana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
